summary: DAI API is not called when graphql initPlaybackSession "adsEnabled": false
description: GIVEN a user is entitled to watch video streams (archive, SVOD, RSN)

steps.action: WHEN a user selects a stream with ads disabled
steps.result: Then no calls are made to [dai.google.com|http://dai.google.com]  (this call is ok for sdkloader: [https://imasdk.googleapis.com/js/sdkloader/ima3_dai.js|https://imasdk.googleapis.com/js/sdkloader/ima3_dai.js])
